case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. MANISHA DAYAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $935.97 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DAYAL, MANISHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
